title: Classic Oil Burner by Dukhni | Brass burner with candle | Use for essential oil, aroma oil, diffuser oils | Relax with home aromatherapy, for stress relief, meditation, massage and home fragrance
features: PACKAGE CONTENTS: Wrought Iron Burner, Brass Bowl, Wooden Coaster, Tea Light Candle

HOW TO USE: Put the black metal burner on the wooden coaster and place the brass bowl above. Add 8-10 drops of the oud oil to water in the bowl. Light a tea light candle and place it below the brass bowl. You can add more oil to your diffuser for a stronger scent or if burning in a very large area

WHERE TO USE: Dukhni diffusers, oil burners are versatile and can be used with diffuser oils, essential oils and aroma oils to scent many different spaces. You can create a welcoming atmosphere in your home, maintain a pleasant aroma in your bathroom, enhance the ambiance in your office, or fragrance your store or office

WHEN TO USE: Dukhni oil burners are ideal for home aromatherapy. To relax and unwind, for stress relief, during massage, prayer, yoga or meditation. It's also 100% cruelty free & vegan making it an ethical choice

HERITAGE: Dukhni has specialized in the art of developing fragrances and incense since 1907. Our journey began in Aden, which formed part of the historic Incense Route. In our quest to be able to translate memories and emotions into experiences, we take great care in creating exceptional products that are compellingly precious yet personal
description: Product description Dukhni Oil Burners will create an authentic arabic vibe and oud mood. This brass burner can be used with tea light candles. It's a great alternative to oud wax melts and incense sticks. Oil diffusers, candle burners are most commonly used with lavender oil, vanilla essential oil, lemongrass essential oil, clove oil and cedarwood oil. The Dukhni Oil Burner has a brass bowl and is suitable to burn any essential oil, aroma oil or diffuser oil. It can be used for home aromatherapy or home fragrance for stress relief, relaxation, in a spa during massage, yoga or meditation. Dukhni blends oudh oil with rose, vetiver, fresh ingredients and floral essential oils to create oud essential oil for diffusers. The alcohol-free essential oils are suitable for home aromatherapy to use in diffusers or humidifiers. Dukhni diffuser oils help you relax, unwind. The arabic scents are authentic and will transport you and evoke memories of Arabia. Directions Place the black metal burner on the wooden coaster and put the brass bowl above. Add 8-10 drops of the oud oil to water in the bowl. Light a tea light candle and place it below the brass bowl. Add more oil to the diffuser for a stronger scent or if burning in a large area. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Do not ingest. See more
